text: The monopolar curved scissors is a surgical instrument used in various types of surgeries. It is a right-angle scissors, which means it is designed to be used on the right side of the body. The monopolar curved scissors is typically made of stainless steel and is used to create a right-angle incision in the skin or other tissues.

The monopolar curved scissors is a surgical instrument used in various neurosurgical procedures. It is a right-angle scissors, which means it is designed to be used on the right side of the brain. The monopolar curved scissors is typically used to access the brain and perform procedures such as craniotomy, which involves removing a portion of the skull to access the brain.
